quality.rationale: 基于共动坐标系切分考查诱导度规与物理距离关系，逻辑清晰且具典型宇宙学背景

origin.question: 19.38 In cosmology one usually uses coordinates comoving with the galaxies. Let $(r, x^i)$ be such a system, and let the metric take the general form$$\mathrm {d s}^{2} = - \mathrm {d} \tau^{2} + 2 \mathrm {g}_{0 \mathrm {i}} \mathrm {d} \tau \mathrm {d x}^{\mathrm {i}} + \mathrm {g}_{\mathrm {i j}} \mathrm {d x}^{\mathrm {i}} \mathrm {d x}^{\mathrm {j}}$$where $\mathbf{g}_{0\mathrm{i}}$ and $\mathbf{g}_{\mathrm {ij}}$ can be functions of $\pmb{\tau}$ and $\mathbf{x}^{\mathrm {i}}$ . Show (b) that $\mathbf{g}_{\cdot \cdot}$ governs proper distances in the hypersurface of constant $\tau$ ;
origin.answer: 当 $\tau$ 固定时 $\mathrm{d}\tau=0$，度规线元退化为 $\mathrm{d}s^2 = g_{ij}\mathrm{d}x^i\mathrm{d}x^j$，此即该三维超曲面上的内蕴线元，故 $g_{ij}$ 直接决定固有距离。
